hero.name: Eduardo Yergas
hero.tagline: Junior Game Designer with a strong passion for game design, QA, and game development. Eager to learn, solve problems, and contribute to creating great player experiences.

about.title: About me
about.bio: As far back as I can remember, video games have been much more than entertainment to me. I've always been fascinated by how an interactive experience can evoke emotions, create memories, and connect with people in unique ways. Over time, that passion evolved into a deeper interest in understanding what lies behind every game: from the design of its mechanics to the way each level works like a carefully crafted puzzle. I'm passionate about analyzing how systems, rules, and mechanics can work together to create fluid, memorable experiences — and that's exactly where I want to contribute.

design.title: Game Design
design.description: Systems, mechanics, and loops that build meaningful player experiences.

technical.title: Technical Design
technical.description: Bridging design and code with Blueprints and engine tools.

level.title: Level Design
level.description: Spaces that guide, surprise, and give the player agency.

qa.title: QA & Testing
qa.description: Finding what breaks the experience before the player does.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Open to junior design roles, QA, technical design, and game jam collaborations.
